creator: tingox+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
memtest86+ fails to load from loader. Transcribed output:

OK unload
OK load /boot/opt/memtest86+
don't know how to load module '/boot/opt/memtest86+'
OK

This is on a StarLabs StarBook, from UEFI. It is running FreeBSD 14.0-release

root@kg-starone:~ # freebsd-version -ku
14.0-RELEASE-p3
14.0-RELEASE-p4
root@kg-starone:~ # uname -a
FreeBSD kg-starone 14.0-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE-p3 #0: Mon Dec 11 04:56:01 UTC 2023     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64


memtest86+ was installed from pkg (quarterly)

root@kg-starone:~ # pkg info memtest\*
memtest86+-5.01_5
